headline: Investing.com’s stocks of the week
summary: Investing.com -- U.S. stocks look set to close out the week significantly higher, given significant signs of a relaxation in Middle East tensions. The news led to strong moves in impacted names.

headline: Iran Declares Strait Of Hormuz Open To All Vessels: Crude Plunges 14%, Airlines And Cruise Stocks Soar
summary: Iran's Foreign Minister declared the Strait of Hormuz fully open to commercial shipping. Crude oil plunged nearly 14%. Airlines and cruise lines surged.

headline: Assessing Marathon Petroleum (MPC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Marathon Petroleum Is On Investors’ Radar Today Marathon Petroleum (MPC) has drawn attention after a strong past 3 months, with a total return of 28.82%. This has prompted investors to reassess how current pricing lines up with its recent performance profile. See our latest analysis for Marathon Petroleum.
